title: Cash Shop Update for May 20
author: Global MapleStory
summary: “Cash Shop Update for May 20” is an official Cash Shop notice from Global MapleStory Official News on 2026-05-19. Its canonical Nexon article and publication metadata are retained for source-backed verification.
